KeywordLists.Keywords: a b c d e f A B C D E F _
func let var const struct enum impl protocol import type class extern macro test pub extension subscript
if else while for in match case return break continue guard try async await yield get set willSet didSet
i8 i16 i32 i64 u8 u16 u32 u64 f32 f64 bool string void String Map Set File Result
true false nil self super init deinit newValue oldValue
mut ref dyn override private public open internal fileprivate static final comptime where as is convenience lazy

print println readLine format toString parseInt parseInt64 parseFloat charToString abs min max sqrt pow floor ceil round sin cos tan log log10 len push pop append sleep env exit args clock clockMs randInt randFloat assert assertMsg assertEq assertEqStr assertEqFloat

fileRead fileWrite fileAppend fileRemove fileCopy dirList dirCreate dirRemove dirExists pathJoin pathDirname pathBasename pathExtension pathExists pathAbsolute isFile strRepeat strPadLeft strPadRight strContains strReplace strSplit strJoin strTrim strTrimLeft strTrimRight strStartsWith strEndsWith strToUpper strToLower strReverse strChars strLines forEach map filter reduce enumerate zip sorted reversed flatten any all count

httpGet httpPost httpPut httpPatch httpDelete jsonCreate jsonSet jsonSetInt jsonSetFloat jsonSetBool jsonRemove jsonGet jsonGetInt jsonGetFloat jsonGetBool jsonGetArray jsonGetObject jsonIsValid jsonKeys jsonCount regexCompile regexTest regexMatch regexFind regexFindAll regexReplace regexExec regexExecGroups regexFindGroups regexReplaceCompiled regexFree sha256 md5 hmacSha256 base64Encode base64Decode hexEncode hexDecode crc32 mutexCreate mutexLock mutexUnlock mutexTryLock mutexFree atomicCreate atomicLoad atomicStore atomicAdd atomicSub atomicCas atomicFree channelCreate channelSend channelReceive channelClose channelLen channelFree taskGroupCreate taskGroupSpawn taskGroupAwaitAll taskGroupCancelAll taskGroupCount taskGroupFree taskSelect withTimeout schedulerInit schedulerShutdown schedulerWorkerCount asyncFileRead asyncFileWrite logDebug logInfo logWarn logError logSetLevel dateNow timeNow datetimeNow dateFormat dateYear dateMonth dateDay dateWeekday dateTimestamp dateParse dateAdd dateDiff dateHour dateMinute dateSecond benchStart benchIter benchDone benchReport benchReset exec execOutput processStart processWait processKill processRead processClose isCancelled
